name: Peachy Sour Cream Coffee Cake
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350°F. Grease and flour a 9x13 pan.
Combine butter and sugar in an electric mixer, creaming until smooth. Add egg and sour cream, mixing until blended. Gradually add flour, baking soda, and salt, stirring on the lowest speed just until incorporated. Pour batter into the prepared pan and set aside.
In a medium bowl, combine sugars, flour, and cinnamon. Cut in butter using a pastry cutter or two knives until the mixture forms crumbly crumbs. Sprinkle half of the topping over the batter. Arrange sliced peaches (sliced or peeled) decoratively over the top. Sprinkle remaining topping over the peaches.
Bake for 35 to 40 minutes, or until golden brown. Serve warm.
